(Translated by Google)
Complete and very good attention

reviews.comment:
Siempre amables, atentos y serviciales en el turno y día que sea. Merecen reconocimiento y a veces más apoyo cuando "tocan horas pico" de demanda en atención al público. Un (1) solo playero no es suficiente en algunos momentos del día. Salvo ese detalle, lo demás ok.

(Translated by Google)
Always friendly, attentive, and helpful, no matter the shift or day. They deserve recognition and sometimes more support during peak hours. One attendant isn't enough at certain times of day. Aside from that, everything else is fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLXRpNFVnEAE
